# Access API, gRPC: AccessService.EvaluateAccess

Evaluates a single AuthZEN-compatible access decision.

## gRPC request

```proto
rpc EvaluateAccess (EvaluateAccessRequest) returns (EvaluateAccessResponse)
```

## EvaluateAccessRequest

```json
{
  "subject": {
    "type": "string",
    "id": "string",
    "properties": {}
  },
  "action": {
    "name": "string",
    "properties": {}
  },
  "resource": {
    "type": "string",
    "id": "string",
    "properties": {}
  },
  "context": {}
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| subject | Subject | No description. |
| action | Action | No description. |
| resource | Resource | No description. |
| context | Struct | No description. |

```json
{
  "decision": true,
  "context": {}
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| decision | bool | No description. |
| context | Struct | No description. |
